2606.26904.title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
2606.26904.paper_summary: Video reasoning language models implicitly assume that every input frame is equally reliable. This leads to what we term the Blind Trust Problem: under realistic perturbations such as motion blur, glare, or occlusion, frontier video reasoning models can suffer 15-30%p accuracy drops on real-world embodied benchmarks, while remaining unaware that their visual evidence has been degraded. To address this challenge, we propose Robust-TO, an agentic video understanding framework that explicitly integrates per-frame trustworthiness into every stage of reasoning. Robust-TO organizes heterogeneous visual perception tools under a unified evidence interface. Each tool receives a sub-query derived from the original question and a set of trustworthy frames selected by the reliability-relevance score. It returns evidence in a shared format: a concrete prediction (e.g., a bounding box, motion trajectory, recognized text, or action label), temporal grounding, and a calibrated reliability score. During reasoning, these calibrated scores guide evidence weighting in a three-tier synthesis process (high/medium/low) and define a confidence-cost GRPO reward that jointly optimizes correctness, evidence reliability, and efficiency. On two video reasoning benchmarks spanning eight tasks, Robust-TO achieves 56.4% average accuracy on clean inputs, surpassing the strongest open-source baseline by 10.6%p and outperforming Gemini-2.5-Pro (46.2%). Under five realistic corruption types, Robust-TO maintains 54.3% average accuracy, 5.8%p above the strongest open-source baseline, while exhibiting the smallest clean-to-corrupted accuracy drop among all compared methods.
2606.26904.paper_summary_zh: 視頻推理語言模型隱含地假設每個輸入幀都是同樣可靠的。這導致了我們所稱的盲目信任問題：在現實的擾動下，例如運動模糊、眩光或遮擋，前沿視頻推理模型在現實世界的具身基準上可能會遭受15-30%的準確率下降，同時對其視覺證據已被降級的事實毫無察覺。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了Robust-TO，一個主動的視頻理解框架，明確將每幀的可信度整合到推理的每個階段。Robust-TO在統一的證據接口下組織異質的視覺感知工具。每個工具接收來自原始問題的子查詢和一組由可靠性-相關性分數選出的可信幀。它以共享格式返回證據：具體的預測（例如，邊界框、運動軌跡、識別文本或動作標籤）、時間基準和經過校準的可靠性分數。在推理過程中，這些經過校準的分數指導證據加權，並在三層合成過程中（高/中/低）定義一個信心-成本GRPO獎勵，該獎勵共同優化正確性、證據可靠性和效率。在涵蓋八個任務的兩個視頻推理基準上，Robust-TO在乾淨輸入上達到了56.4%的平均準確率，超過了最強的開源基準10.6個百分點，並且表現優於Gemini-2.5-Pro（46.2%）。在五種現實的損壞類型下，Robust-TO保持了54.3%的平均準確率，比最強的開源基準高出5.8個百分點，同時在所有比較方法中顯示出最小的乾淨到損壞的準確率下降。
2606.26904.author: Yangfan He et.al.
2606.26904.authors: Yangfan He, Yujin Choi, Jaehong Yoon
